message:
test(extensions): add integration test for conformance matrix generation (bd-2kyq)

Add ext_conformance_matrix.rs integration test that loads the real
inclusion list and API matrix from docs/, builds the full conformance
test plan via build_test_plan(), and validates:

- Coverage: every extension category and host capability has at least
  one conformance cell
- Required cells are present for critical category×capability pairs
- Output is written to docs/extension-conformance-test-plan.json for
  documentation and CI validation

This test ensures the conformance matrix stays in sync with the
inclusion list as new extensions are added.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
